ocr.title: Motor OCR
ocr.engineAutoHint: PaddleOCR → EasyOCR → Tesseract — tentat quemque motorem ordine
ocr.reqAuto: Nulla postulata specifica; utitur quidquid disponibile est.
ocr.reqPaddle: Installa: pip install paddlepaddle paddleocr. Vide scripts/setup_dms.sh. GPU: NVIDIA GPU compatibile cum CUDA + nvidia-docker.
ocr.reqEasy: Installa: pip install easyocr. GPU valde commendatum (PyTorch cum CUDA); CPU operatur sed tardum est pro documentis magnis.
ocr.reqTesseract:
Installa fasciculum systematis Tesseract:
  • Debian/Ubuntu: sudo apt install tesseract-ocr tesseract-ocr-deu tesseract-ocr-eng
  • macOS: brew install tesseract
  • Windows: descende ex GitHub UB-Mannheim/tesseract
